title: cicerbita racemosa
intro: Cicerbita racemosa, also known as the Indian shot or African daisy, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Cicerbita racemosa is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
